summary: Iteration 30: Pre-Go-Live Bug Fix Verification - ALL 22 TESTS PASSED. Bearer token authentication for 4 portal routes and login token aliases validated across all 3 role types.

login_token_aliases.description: POST /api/auth/login returns session_token, token, and access_token (all identical)

portal_merch_products.description: Returns 200 with products array using Bearer token

portal_cafe_menu.description: Returns 200 with items array using Bearer token

portal_kids_children.description: Returns 200 with children array using Bearer token

portal_media_sermons.description: Returns 200 with videos array using Bearer token

token_alias_usage.description: Verified that 'token' and 'access_token' aliases work for Bearer auth

auth_me_bearer_token.description: Returns user info when called with Bearer token

critical_code_review_comments: get_session_token_from_request() (line 2335) correctly prefers Authorization header over cookies
Login response (lines 2469-2471) includes session_token, token, and access_token aliases
get_current_member_user() (line 5921) accepts member, church_admin, platform_admin, admin roles
All 4 portal routes use tenant fallback with DEFAULT_TENANT_ID for platform_admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-go-live bug verified fixed. Key validations: (1) Login returns 3 token aliases: session_token, token, access_token - all identical. (2) All 4 portal routes (merch/products, cafe/menu, kids/children, media/sermons) work with Bearer token auth. (3) All 3 roles tested: member, church_admin (admin@abundant.church), platform_admin (admin@solomon.ai). (4) Unauthorized requests correctly return 401.

mocked_apis.merch_checkout: Products list is real; checkout/payment flows are MOCKED
mocked_apis.cafe_payment: Menu items are real; payment flows are MOCKED

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: 4 portal routes error with Bearer token direct API calls
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: get_session_token_from_request() now prefers Authorization header over cookies
bug_fix_verification.result: ALL 22 TESTS PASSED - Bug is fixed
